prose.en: Incorporate security and privacy roles and responsibilities into organizational position descriptions.

guidance.en: Specification of security and privacy roles in individual organizational position descriptions facilitates clarity in understanding the security or privacy responsibilities associated with the roles and the role-based security and privacy training requirements for the roles.

prose.en: security roles and responsibilities are incorporated into organizational position descriptions;
privacy roles and responsibilities are incorporated into organizational position descriptions.

objects.en: Organizational personnel with personnel security responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
organizational personnel with human capital management responsibilities
Organizational processes for managing position descriptions
